name: Cucumber Tomato Salad
author: Jeanine Donofrio, Phoebe Moore
description: This cucumber tomato salad recipe is one of my favorite summer side dishes! Featuring juicy tomatoes, sliced cucumbers, onion, herbs, and a tangy dressing, it's refreshing, delicious, and simple to make.

ingredients.ingredient: large English cucumber (sliced into thin half-moons (2½ cups))
chopped fresh herbs (such as basil, parsley, dill, and/or mint)

steps: In a large bowl, toss together the cucumber, tomatoes, red onion, lemon juice, vinegar, salt, and several grinds of pepper. Chill in the refrigerator for 10 minutes.
Transfer to a serving bowl, leaving any excess juices behind. Drizzle with the olive oil, sprinkle with the herbs, and toss. Sprinkle with flaky sea salt, season to taste, and serve.
